name: @pyreon/example-native-finance
description: PRIVATE / EXPERIMENTAL — Phase-5 finance-tracker showcase. SINGLE source compiles to web + iOS + Android, exercising the data/services hook emit (#1689): useAuth<User> auth-state container, useDatabase persistence, a cross-screen defineStore reactive ledger, computed balance, validated useForm, multi-screen routing + store-backed auth-gate, and canonical primitives. The verified mirror lives at packages/native/compiler/src/fixtures/showcase-finance.tsx (swiftc + kotlinc gated).
